transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder VLOG for yesterday, the 5th of December, it's already 2 o'clock in the afternoon.
I was up, I didn't do a video because I was just up working the whole time, my roommate gave me a bud and I smoked.
Got high for the first time in like a month, more than a month.
It was awesome dude, I was a little bit stressed anyway.
I was riding my bike there on the trainer and working on this, on my Kindle page right now I'm adding numbers.
I was working until 8.30 in the morning dude, so that's why it's 2 and I'm getting up.
And yeah, so I got the munchies, I got $400.50 worth of candy.
I got those little fire thingies, box for a dollar, and then soft jelly ranchers, and then the popsicles.
And then a whole $15 worth, it was like $2 oven meals, a bunch of those, I've got 2 cooking right now.
But yeah, I'm thinking maybe I don't want to work this winter because I'm going to get a credit card in the mail pretty soon.
And I think I'll work, you know, not this week because it's so cold, but next week I'll be busy until Christmas.
But I'm going to get a new credit card with my new bank that doesn't have any interest for a whole year.
And I think I can get the maximum bumped up to like $10,000.
So if that's the case, I'll just live really cheap and pay all that stuff off.
The problem is I don't have money to pay my taxes, so we'll see if it's interest-free to get cash as well,
To get cash out and put it in my checking and then write a check for my taxes.
But yeah, I did reply for one job yesterday, but they did jerk screening.
But I have the thing where you take it and it makes it so you pass, cleans you out or something.
But yeah, if I work really hard here, I can do a whole lot of progress yesterday.
I set up my personal website to be able to work with like cell phones and Kindles and stuff.
Because before I couldn't get to the other pages because I only had the drop-down.
They don't do drop-down.
So yeah, anyways, I'm excited about all the stuff I can do here.
I did a lot of riding yesterday on my trainer.
I think after I pig out on all...
I have three different oven meals.
After I pig out on three of those, I'll get back on that.
I was afraid I'd be a little bit bonkish today because I ate so much candy yesterday, but I think I'll be alright.
Anyways, that's that. Peace out.
